chinese_news.title: 第四届中国AIGC产业峰会在京顺利举办！近20位行业大咖解码Agent与非共识机遇
chinese_news.summary:
今日，由量子位主办的第四届中国AIGC产业峰会在京启幕。

2026年，AI产业一路高歌猛进。从“龙虾”到“Harness”，爆款Agent接连出圈、风靡全网。面对层出不穷的新业态与新玩法，不少从业者和普通用户都感到困惑：如何找准AI的使用方式？怎样把握产业机遇？又该如何跟上行业发展的步伐？

正是在这一背景下，本届大会以「@所有人，马上AI起来」为主题，集结近20位行业重磅嘉宾，联动产业头部企业、新锐创业公司、顶尖学术力量，围绕AI Agent商业化落地、多模态技术突破、千行百业场景深耕、算力基础设施变革等核心议题，开启了一场深度交流与思想碰撞。

chinese_news.title: 长鑫科技更新招股书，碧桂园错失300亿
chinese_news.summary:
地产行业内，曾有望跑出两家明星创投企业，一家是世纪金源，另一家是碧桂园。前者现在做得顺风顺水，收获一个又一个IPO，而碧桂园因为地产业务暴雷，需要大量资金保交楼，被迫中断了在科技领域的投资“大爆发”。

01

5月17日，计划登陆科创板的长鑫科技集团股份有限公司（以下简称：长鑫科技）更新了招股书。新招股书的财务数据显示，2026年第一季度，长鑫科技营收508亿元，同比增长719.13%；归母净利润247.62亿元，同比大增1688%，完成创历史的盈亏翻盘（2025年累计亏损366.5亿元）。

可以预计，随着营收和利润的大幅增长，长鑫科技的估值将会再创新高。上市前，长鑫科技的估值已逼近3000亿元。但若按2026年一季度的财务表现，结合同类已上市企业的市盈率计算，部分机构给到长鑫科技的最新估值高达2万亿左右。

长鑫科技是中国大陆规模最大的DRAM研发设计制造一体化（IDM）企业。DRAM芯片是电脑、手机、服务器内存条的核心部件。今年，存储产业

chinese_news.title: 理想新L9上市72小时：老车主复购占大头，仍需从“家庭”破圈
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 徐蔡钰 编辑 | 李勤

“爆了，试驾根本约不上”，5月16至17日，理想新L9上市的首个周末，门店挤满了前来试驾的用户们。

这款在2022年首次面世的增程大六座SUV，发布了第四代车型。新L9分Ultra与Livis两种版本，起售价分别为45.98万元、50.98万元。

相较此前的年度改款，本次新L9的更新幅度更加显著：

全系标配72.7kWh电池，纯电续航达到420公里，综合续航突破1600公里。理想自研马赫芯片首次上车，单颗芯片算力达到1280TOPS。线控转向系统与后轮转向技术的加入，带来了底盘能力的大幅升级；Livis版本额外搭载的800V主动悬架与EMB电子机械制动系统，更是汽车底盘前沿技术的首发落地。

配置拉满的同时，将实际售价较预售价大幅下调5万元，新L9一套“高配降价”的组合拳，力度超出了市场预期。

新车上市后，理想全国门店似乎复现了2022年第一代L9上市的火爆盛况

chinese_news.title: 做出百万台割草机器人后，未岚大陆CEO决定让自己变得“不重要”｜硬氪专访
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

未岚大陆CEO任冠佼等了7年，等到了行业的爆发。

他还记得，2019年刚进入无边界智能割草机器人赛道，自己“只是觉得这个方向一定能火”。到2021年第一代产品推出时，他们也只敢确定，这是一个能做到10-20亿的行业。

直到2025年，增速超出他的预期。IDC数据显示，2025年全球无边界割草机器人出货量达到131.8万台，同比增长182.4%，占整个割草机器人市场出货量的66.2%。未岚大陆自身的累计实现量产，在今年突破100万台，公司营收迈入数十亿量级。

但同时，高速增长的背后，也倒逼任冠佼完成了一场至关重要的认知破局。

任冠佼意识到，行业迭代速度持续加快，以往相对保守的经营方式显然已经跟不上节奏。

他逼着自己从一个工程师成长为公司掌舵人。最近一年，任冠佼跳出琐碎的一线工作、学习战略研判，并慢慢适应创业者最难的一课——学会放手。

他不再事事亲力

chinese_news.title: 要做数字劳动力生产工厂，「未来式智能」完成Pre-A轮融资
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王欣逸

编辑｜邓咏仪

36氪获悉，未来式智能（AutoAgents.ai）近日完成Pre-A轮融资，新进投资方包括凡创资本、中关村资本、探元资本，老股东东证创新、麟阁创投跟投，本轮融资主要用于算力投入、团队扩张以及新产品的生态建设运营。

未来式智能成立于2023年6月，专注于以智能体技术赋能知识工作者。核心团队来自达摩院、腾讯、字节跳动和谷歌。创始人兼CEO杨劲松曾在达摩院担任产品/商业化总监，曾任字节飞书AI负责人、亚马逊AWS aPaaS平台负责人，主导推出阿里灵杰、通义-Alicemind，在AI产品和商业化方面有着多年经验。

作为核心产品之一的企业级智能体搭建平台“灵搭”，旨在解决企业部署和应用大模型时的核心诉求：数据安全隐私、权限分级管理、复杂系统集成，以及智能体在真实业务场景中的交付稳定性。

“灵搭”从诞生之初便一直把重点放在企业客户，尤其是电力、金融、制造等对稳定性和合规要求极高的行业。

chinese_news.title: 早期项目 | Chance AI获美图等数百万美元投资，用户数已达20万
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，Visual Agent（视觉智能体）创业公司Chance AI宣布完成数百万美元天使轮融资。本轮由美图领投，NYX Ventures、阿里系投资机构等跟投。融资将用于模型能力迭代、北美学生群体增长、以及社区与商业化探索。

Chance AI成立于2025年，核心产品是全球第一款以摄像头为主要交互入口的AI产品——Visual Agent（视觉智能体）。

与传统AI产品依赖输入框不同，用户打开Chance AI后直接拍摄眼前内容，系统即可理解视觉意图并提供判断、建议和行动方案。

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨谷歌推出Gemini 3.5系列模型；DeepSeek回应用户“对话泄露”疑虑；全国存款十强城市出炉
chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

  • 谷歌推出Gemini 3.5系列模型
  • 洁丽雅回应豪门内斗传闻，“毛巾少爷”1个月带货超500万元
  • 巨力索具连续第二日跌停
  • 前三星芯片负责人：明年内存将降价
  • 自费流感疫苗也可使用医保报销
  • 谷歌搜索宣布大改版，AI模式与代理助手全面嵌入

TOP 3 大新闻

DeepSeek回应用户“对话泄露”疑虑

5月19日，DeepSeek发布关于< think >字符触发模型异常回复的说明。近期关注到有用户反馈，在与DeepSeek模型的对话中输入< think >这类特殊字符后，模型偶发返回不可预期的内容，使部分用户产生了“对话泄露”的疑虑。针对这一问题，技术团队经全面排查后发现：输入< think >等字符触发返回异常内容，属于特殊字符引发的模型幻觉，不涉及安全问题或隐私泄露。

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NVDA close above $140 on the day of its next earnings announcement (within 90 days)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: NASDAQ official close price on earnings day; Investor Relations press release timestamp.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reported options pricing has systematically overestimated NVDA post-earnings swings in 6 of last 7 quarters; market inefficiency suggests IV crush opportunity and directional mispricing.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cboe LiveVol options analysis showing short-dated calls trading at premium to puts despite historical overestimation pattern.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin experience a quantum-related security incident (loss of funds from legacy addresses) by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Blockchain transaction audit (Glassnode, Chain Analysis public reports); affected wallet disclosure; major exchange or custody loss claim.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Glassnode flagged ~10% of BTC supply as 'structurally unsafe' from quantum breakthrough; market is pricing zero probability despite explicit research showing vulnerability window.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph 'Nearly 10% of Bitcoin supply is structurally unsafe from quantum breakthrough: Glassnode'; no major hedging visible in BTC options market.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. federal government reduce income taxes on the bottom 50% of earners by more than 10% before December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Tax Cuts & Jobs Act amendments or new legislation signed into law; IRS guidance; Joint Committee on Taxation static scoring.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Bezos publicly endorsed zero income tax for bottom half today; political capital and timing suggest serious legislative push; market underestimating probability of Republican-controlled Congress action.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC headline: 'Jeff Bezos says bottom half of earners should pay zero in income taxes' with Trump administration alignment signals.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Singapore approve or reinstate a major crypto payment license (>$100M+ transaction volume capacity) by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) official press release; new license grant announcement.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Singapore just revoked Bsquared's license; paradoxically, regulatory clarity cycle often accelerates new approvals; market sees only negative signal, not reputational reset opportunity.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk 'Singapore revokes crypto payment license of Bsquared over regulatory breaches'; historical MAS pattern of quick re-issuance post-enforcement.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the EU formally recommend DeFi protocol regulation amendments to MiCA by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: EU Commission formal consultation outcome report; European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) policy statement.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: EU MiCA consultation just opened with explicit DeFi gap focus; 4-month window allows formal recommendation; Ethereum and DeFi assets are pricing zero regulatory tailwind despite consultation launch.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph & CoinDesk 'EU opens consultation on MiCA stablecoin rules and DeFi gaps'; Vitalik Buterin discussing Ethereum privacy measures align with regulatory modernization discourse.

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin breaks $280K by year-end 2026 on Fed rate-cut cycle, easing geopolitical premium (Iran talks reducing tail risk), and quantum-safe narrative driving institutional hedge buying.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Bitcoin metrics suggest February $60K selloff marked bottom; on-chain accumulation evident.
Cointelegraph: Bitcoin price model targets $255K conservatively; multiple analysts modeling $280K+ upside.
CNBC: Trump announces Iran talks 'final stages', reducing oil/geopolitical risk premium that compressed crypto.
Glassnode: 10% of BTC supply flagged as quantum-unsafe, creating institutional demand for hardware wallets and quantum-hedged BTC holdings.
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed surprises with rate hikes if inflation re-accelerates (CPI shock); Trump's fiscal stimulus (Bezos tax cut proposal) causes inflation expectations to rise, forcing Powell to tighten; macro risk-off overwhelms crypto gains.
investment_theses.expression: BTC perpetual futures (long 10x leverage if risk tolerance high, 3x if moderate) or BTC call options (Jan 2027, $280K strike); alternatively, 60/40 BTC/ETH long pair vs. short DXY.

investment_theses.thesis: Ethereum underpriced relative to ETH-native AI agent buildout and DeFi regulatory clarity; EU MiCA consultation tailwind + Vitalik privacy tech unlock mid-cycle ETH rallies to $3,200+ by September 2026.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: Chinese AI agent startups (未来式智能, AutoAgents.ai) raising Pre-A rounds with focus on ETH/on-chain execution; ecosystem momentum building.
Cointelegraph: Vitalik outlining Ethereum privacy measures; institutional demand for private smart contracts accelerating.
CoinDesk: EU MiCA consultation opened with DeFi gaps as explicit focus; regulatory clarity removes regulatory overhang.
Hacker News: Qwen3.7-Max and Gemini 3.5 Flash agent releases; agentic payment support (Fireblocks) integrating with x402 Foundation—Ethereum-linked tooling.
investment_theses.counter_view: Ethereum faces execution risk: Shanghai hard fork delays, MEV complexity worsens, or transaction costs spike again; ETH/BTC ratio compression as Bitcoin dominance increases in risk-off environment.
investment_theses.expression: ETH perps (long 5x) with stop below $1,800 support; or ETH call spreads (buy $2,500 call, sell $3,200 call, Sept 2026 expiry) to cap downside while capturing mean-reversion upside.

investment_theses.thesis: Stablecoin and payment-rail tokens (PENGU, VVV, LIT trending; EU sovereign payments narrative) outperform on geopolitical de-dollarization and retail CBDC hedging; Zcash (ZEC) gains on privacy premium ahead of quantum threat.
supporting_signals: Hacker News: 'Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment' (556 score); EU payment sovereignty momentum clear.
BBC: UK announced 'historic' trade deal with Gulf states; bilateral payment infrastructure outside USD clearing gaining traction.
36Kr: Singapore NVDA R&D expansion + regional AI hub positioning; Asia-Pacific stablecoin and payment infrastructure race accelerating.
CoinDesk: Crypto campaign cash (Fairshake) showing retail demand for payment/regulatory clarity tokens; primary markets pricing in regulatory tailwind.
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump administration prioritizes USD hegemony; sanctions enforcement tightens, EU sovereign payment adoption slows; retail FOMO exhausts, funding for payment layer tokens dries up.
investment_theses.expression: Equal-weight basket of PENGU (Pudgy Penguins—retail/culture narrative), VVV (Venice Token—sovereign payment), LIT (Lighter—DEX/payment layer), and 2x ZEC (Zcash—privacy hedge) held 4-6 months; rebalance monthly.

investment_theses.thesis: Memory (DRAM/NAND) chip inflation trade: Samsung labor breakdown + DRAM shortage signals + WeiAI chairman forecast of 2026 price recovery create commodity upside for MU (Micron), SK Hynix ADR; memory ETF (SMH) outperforms semiconductors.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: 'Samsung labor talks collapsed; WeiAI chairman says DRAM, NAND may face price surge' (today headline). Explicit supply-side confirmation.
36Kr: Long Xinxin (长鑫科技) IPO on Shanghai STAR; Chinese memory fab demand signaling capacity confidence.
CNBC: NVDA data-center demand remains robust; large model inference scaling requires memory bandwidth—structural demand tide lifting all memory boats.
Hacker News: Gemini 3.5, Qwen3.7-Max, LLM scaling continues; AI inference CapEx cycles require HBM and high-bandwidth memory—commodity demand inelastic.
investment_theses.counter_view: Memory oversupply emerges faster than expected; Chinese fabs (SMIC, YMTC) ramp faster; geopolitical sanctions tighten on China, demand destruction; AI inference moves to lower-precision quantization, reducing memory requirements per FLOP.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU (Micron) stock at current levels; or buy $150 call options (Dec 2026 expiry); alternatively, overweight SMH (Semiconductor ETF) vs. QQQ with stop-loss at $80 (SMH current support).

investment_theses.thesis: DXY (U.S. dollar index) peaks by mid-2026 as Trump fiscal stimulus (Bezos tax cuts, Trian PE deal activity) ignite inflation expectations; commodity-linked assets (gold, BTC, crude) benefit from dollar weakness; carry-trade unwind reverses May 2024 losses.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Bezos publicly endorses 'zero income taxes for bottom half'—deficit expansion signal; fiscal stimulus narrative gaining billionaire endorsement.
CNBC: Trian Fund seeking Wendy's privatization funding—$5B+ LBO capital deployment signals PE dry powder ready for deployment, inflation hedging activity.
CoinDesk: Iran negotiations 'final stages' reducing geopolitical premium; historical: lower oil volatility + USD weakness = commodity upside.
